data.name: Her Last Piece
data.detailed_description:
.

關於遊戲：

Her Last Piece 是由 SpiceMerchantsGames! 帶給您的一部慢熱的哥特風格成人視覺小說遊戲。

Her Last Piece 是一款由玩家的選擇來推動劇情發展的視覺小說遊戲，擁有精美的美術和有待揭開的謎團！在阿維尼婭的心理遊戲中，選擇你自己的道路！你會繼續專注於逃跑嗎？還是試圖贏得她的芳心？不過要小心......她那佔有慾極強的黑暗慾望可能會讓你得不償失！


目前的故事……

你被盧米納瑞姆王國派去執行一項危險的任務，殺死黑暗女王阿維尼婭，卻發現自己成了她的俘虜，被迫在廢棄的城堡裡做她的奴隸。 你認為自己的生命將走到痛苦的盡頭，因為你將為她的每一個黑暗念頭勞碌奔波。

……但一切並不像看上去的那樣，黑暗女王獨自生活在她高聳的堡壘中，她並不是你所知道的那個人，也不是你所知道的那個樣子

你能揭開黑暗女王的神秘面紗嗎？她到底是誰？她想從你身上得到什麼？

……甚至，你還能活著講述這個故事嗎？[/u]


女王陛下靜候你的選擇…

女王陛下靜候你的選擇…
data.short_description: 选项推动的黑暗哥特式浪漫视觉小说……你獨自被困在她的城堡裡，你能在病嬌黑暗女王的陰謀中倖存下來嗎？還是，你會被她的魅力所迷惑？記住......她會撒謊。
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11 (64-bit version, desktop mode only)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6600 equivalent or higher performance (including AMD)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.3 or later
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11 (64-bit version, desktop mode only)
  • 處理器: i5-8600, i7-7700, quad-core or higher
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950 or higher graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Her Last Piece
data.detailed_description:
About the game:

Her Last Piece is a slow-burn, adult, gothic erotica bought you by SpiceMerchantsGames!

Her Last Piece is A striking choice based VN game with beautiful art and a mystery to unravel! Choose your path as you try to survive Arvenia's mind games! Will you stay focused on your escape? Or will you perhaps try to win her heart? Be careful though ... her possessive dark desires might lead to more than you bargained for!

We plan to sell Her Last Piece as three Acts! With the first of them releasing onto Early Access! We hope you enjoy it and remember..She lies.

Sent on a perilous mission by the kingdom of Luminarium to slay the dark queen Arvenia, you find yourself her prisoner, forced to work as her slave within the now derelict castle. You believe your life to be at its painful end, as you expect to toil away serving her every dark whim.

... But all is not as it seems, the dark queen lives alone within her towering fortress, and she isn’t who, or what, you were told she would be.

Can you unravel the mysteries of the dark queen? Who is she really? What does she want from you?

…And will you even live to tell the tale?

Whatever you choose, her majesty awaits...

Fully animated Live2D sprites
Fully animated adult scenes
Unlockable Gallery
High quality Original soundtrack
High quality voice acting
Fully Voiced Heroine
A very pattable Puppet
Two story branches

data.short_description: A choice-based dark gothic romance Visual Novel... Trapped alone in her castle, can you survive a dark yandere queen's schemes? Or will you fall for her charms? Remember... She lies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, 11 (64-bit version, desktop mode only)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6600 equivalent or higher performance (including AMD)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.3 or later
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, 11 (64-bit version, desktop mode only)
  • Processor: i5-8600, i7-7700, quad-core or higher
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950 or higher graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
